mandate: Assess project scope and assemble the optimal team of experts to ensure full coverage of all technical dimensions.

checklist.consider_platform: Did you check if the changes touch platform-specific code? If so, did you include the relevant Platform Specialist?
checklist.consider_ipc_mojo: Did you check if the task involves IPC or Mojo pipes? If so, did you include experts in data serialization and bounds checking?
checklist.consider_memory_safety: Did you check for pointer manipulation, buffer usage, or ownership transfers? If so, did you include the Security Expert?
checklist.consider_threading: Did you check if the changes cross sequence boundaries or use locks? If so, did you include the Concurrency Expert?
checklist.consider_privacy: Did you check if any user data or metrics are being logged or transmitted? If so, did you include the Privacy Expert?
checklist.consider_testability: Did you ensure that the Test Expert is included to verify coverage for complex edge cases?
checklist.ensure_language_expert: Did you ensure that a C++ or platform-specific language expert is included to review code idioms and modern usage?
checklist.ensure_domain_expert: Did you include domain specialists (e.g., WebRTC, Codec) if the change touches those technical areas?
checklist.ensure_independent_perspective: Did you include at least one reviewer who was not involved in the implementation phase to provide a fresh, unbiased perspective?
checklist.ensure_mandate_overlap: For critical aspects like security or data safety, did you ensure that at least two independent reviewers will evaluate the same checklist items to achieve consensus?
checklist.ensure_cross_component_coverage: If the change spans multiple components or layers, did you ensure you have at least one reviewer specialized in each affected area?
